title: Cuneiform Tablet #0882: Ur III Lexical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a lexical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a lexical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Lexical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records lexical matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
